user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new travel vendor, so that approved vendors are available for booking travel.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Vendors screen; When I click Add new travel vendor and enter the name, phone, email and applicable locations; Then the vendor is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to record vendor contact details such as phone and email, so that travel coordinators can reach the vendor.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a travel vendor; When I enter phone and email; Then the contact details are saved and displayed in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign applicable locations to a vendor, so that the vendor is only offered where it operates.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring a travel vendor; When I select applicable locations; Then those locations are saved and shown in the Applicable locations column

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing travel vendor, so that vendor details stay accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Given a vendor exists in the list; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the travel vendors list, so that I see the latest vendor records.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Vendors screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current vendors
